appraisal_events.evidence: « il ne répondit pas à ses agaceries … puis il me parla comme si j'étais seul »
appraisal_events.explanation: Albertine tries to attract the attention of Robert de Saint-Loup insistently; he ignores her and turns the conversation towards the narrator, which annoys her and leaves her temporarily aside.

status_effects.explanation: Her flirtation fails and she is kept aside when Robert addresses the narrator, which puts her in a bad mood.
His polite refusal of Albertine's advances and his refocusing on the friend locally present him as loyal and in control.
